---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve BOSC Community Library
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS 12.0, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 95, Firefox 92, Safari 15]
- **Version**: [e.g. v1.2.3 or commit hash]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 18.17.0]
- **Database**: [e.g. PostgreSQL 14.5]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here:

- Error messages or stack traces
- Relevant log files
- Configuration details
- Related issues or PRs

## Severity

- [ ] Critical - Blocks core functionality
- [ ] High - Major impact on usability
- [ ] Medium - Minor impact on usability
- [ ] Low - Cosmetic or trivial issue

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have verified the bug still exists in the latest version
- [ ] I have provided enough information for reproduction
- [ ] I have followed the Code of Conduct
